name: Fruit Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the glaze ingredients in a saucepan: combine orange juice, water, lemon juice, cornstarch, and 1 cup sugar.
2. Add a dash of salt to the mixture.
3. Cook over medium heat until it boils and thickens.
4. Let the glaze cool completely.
5. Prepare the cream cheese sauce by combining 8 oz cream cheese, 1 tsp vanilla extract, and 1/2 cup sugar in a bowl.
6. Roll out the sugar cookie dough to fit a buttered pizza pan.
7. Spread the cookie dough evenly on the pan.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes or until set.
9. Allow the crust to cool completely.
10. Spread the cream cheese sauce over the cooled crust.
11. Arrange sliced peaches, grapes, bananas, strawberries, and kiwi on top of the sauce.
12. Pour the cooled glaze over the fruit.
13. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
